63ab959c491bf8105af0c9fa.question: A depiction of this figure that was exhibited in Brooklyn in 1999 incorporated cut-out pornographic images of women’s buttocks and elephant dung. Rudy Giuliani called that Chris Ofili depiction "sick." Another painting named for this figure features an image of St. Jerome unfurling a scroll in the lower right. A depiction of this figure by Raphael includes a bird being held out by John the Baptist for Jesus to pet. This figure is depicted in paintings titled for her “of the Long Neck” and “of the Goldfinch,” as well as in paintings of the Annunciation, in which Gabriel tells this virgin that she will bear a son. For 10 points, name this woman often shown with her child, Jesus Christ.
63ab959c491bf8105af0c9fa.question_sanitized: A depiction of this figure that was exhibited in Brooklyn in 1999 incorporated cut-out pornographic images of women's buttocks and elephant dung. Rudy Giuliani called that Chris Ofili depiction "sick." Another painting named for this figure features an image of St. Jerome unfurling a scroll in the lower right. A depiction of this figure by Raphael includes a bird being held out by John the Baptist for Jesus to pet. This figure is depicted in paintings titled for her "of the Long Neck" and "of the Goldfinch," as well as in paintings of the Annunciation, in which Gabriel tells this virgin that she will bear a son. For 10 points, name this woman often shown with her child, Jesus Christ.
63ab959c491bf8105af0c9fa.answer: <u>Madonna</u> [or the Virgin <u>Mary</u>; do NOT accept “Mary Magdalene”]
63ab959c491bf8105af0c9fa.answer_sanitized: Madonna [or the Virgin Mary; do NOT accept "Mary Magdalene"]

63ab959c491bf8105af0ca55.question: Green spoonworms will develop this trait in the absence of others with it. In polygynous [puh-LIJ-uh-nuhs] species, organisms with this trait are favored if their mothers are in poor condition, according to the Trivers–Willard hypothesis. In the haplo-diploidy system, organisms with this trait develop from fertilized diploid eggs. During development, low and high egg temperatures increase the percentage of American alligators with this trait. Birds and butterflies with this trait have ZW chromosomes. For 10 points, name this trait possessed by humans with XX sex chromosomes.
63ab959c491bf8105af0ca55.question_sanitized: Green spoonworms will develop this trait in the absence of others with it. In polygynous [puh-LIJ-uh-nuhs] species, organisms with this trait are favored if their mothers are in poor condition, according to the Trivers-Willard hypothesis. In the haplo-diploidy system, organisms with this trait develop from fertilized diploid eggs. During development, low and high egg temperatures increase the percentage of American alligators with this trait. Birds and butterflies with this trait have ZW chromosomes. For 10 points, name this trait possessed by humans with XX sex chromosomes.
63ab959c491bf8105af0ca55.answer: <u>female</u>s [or <u>femaleness</u>; or <u>feminine</u>; accept equivalents and word forms]
63ab959c491bf8105af0ca55.answer_sanitized: females [or femaleness; or feminine; accept equivalents and word forms]

63ab959c491bf8105af0ca5c.leadin: The seismic waves named for this scientist can move the ground up and down. For 10 points each:
63ab959c491bf8105af0ca5c.leadin_sanitized: The seismic waves named for this scientist can move the ground up and down. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this scientist who co-discovered argon with Ramsay, and who namesake criterion gives the minimum distance between two objects that may be resolved into distinct objects.

Rayleigh, together with Plesset, names an ODE that governs the dynamics of these objects. Cavitation is the formation of these objects, and sonoluminescence is the emission of light that accompanies the bursting of them. In soft drinks, these objects are caused by carbon dioxide.
In fluid mechanics, a large value for the dimensionless Rayleigh number indicates that a fluid is likely undergoing this form of heat transfer, which comes in free and forced varieties.
parts_sanitized: Name this scientist who co-discovered argon with Ramsay, and who namesake criterion gives the minimum distance between two objects that may be resolved into distinct objects.

Rayleigh, together with Plesset, names an ODE that governs the dynamics of these objects. Cavitation is the formation of these objects, and sonoluminescence is the emission of light that accompanies the bursting of them. In soft drinks, these objects are caused by carbon dioxide.
In fluid mechanics, a large value for the dimensionless Rayleigh number indicates that a fluid is likely undergoing this form of heat transfer, which comes in free and forced varieties.
answers_sanitized: Lord Rayleigh [or 3rd Baron Rayleigh; or John William Strutt]
